title: Player Chains
description: Try and beat Minecraft chained together!
body:
### Try and beat Minecraft chained together!
Chained players are connected with a stretchy lead, alike to leashing a mob.

Commands:

`/chain remove <player1> <player2>` - Removes a chain/lead between two players

`/chain add <player1> <player2>` - Removes a chain/lead between two players

`/gamerule chainLength _` - Sets the length of chains between players (default 3.5)

`/gamerule chainRespawnCooldownSeconds _` - Sets the respawning cooldown in seconds (default 0)

`/gamerule chainRespawnPlayersToChain _` - Sets if players should be respawned to the chain they are a part of, instead of their spawnpoint. If false, all chained players will be teleported to the respawning player's spawnpoint. (default false)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1pxbT2QqtK0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
